evidence: Lets play a game. What should we play?
A game of tic-tac-toe sounds good. Do you want to start?
Ill place an "O" in the top right corner
interactionPattern.rationale: The exchange is organized around jointly enacting a tic-tac-toe game (turn-based co-action), though the AI does not effectively execute game moves.

evidence: Lets play a game. What should we play?

Ill place an "O" in the top center space.
powerDynamics.rationale: The human sets the activity (game choice) and drives the sequence by declaring successive moves.

evidence: Sure, I can play a game of tic-tac-toe with you.

evidence: Sure, I can place an "O" in the top right corner.

You have already filled out the top 3 spaces, as you correctly pointed out.

aiRole.rationale: The AI accepts participation in the joint activity (co-constructor) and asks for clarification to proceed (social-facilitator), with a brief rule/status acknowledgment about the board state (expert-system).
